span.p:
API Gateway
Envoy + Go-sidecar
TLS, JWT, rate-limit,
routing /api/v1/*,
RFC 7807 error envelope

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Catalog Service
Go 1.22
рестораны, меню, поиск,
pg_trgm + PostGIS Day-1,
cache-aside через Redis

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Order Service
Go 1.22
корзина (Redis),
жизненный цикл заказа,
idempotent POST, outbox

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Payment Service
Go 1.22
инициация PSP,
идемпотентный webhook,
reconciliation-worker

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Tracking Service
Go 1.22
WebSocket + SSE,
hot-state в Redis,
GEO курьера

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Notification Service
Go 1.22, consumer-only
Kafka → push/SMS,
retry + DLQ,
шаблоны

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PostgreSQL 16
Patroni HA + read-replica
schemas: catalog_db, orders_db
ACID, outbox,
monthly partitioning

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Redis 7 Cluster
корзина, idempotency-keys,
hot-cache карточек,
GEO курьера, rate-limit

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Kafka / Redpanda
outbox-relay,
orders.events,
payments.events,
notifications.dlq

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
S3 Object Storage
фото блюд,
presigned upload,
репликация ≥ 2 AZ
